violations.text: The lunch menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH Guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025
Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information. Date of last shellfish used was lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Technician arrived during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

Serval refrigerator gaskets were observed in poor repair. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the bar dish machine. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of several refrigerator gaskets. have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The receptacle at the grease trap was observed leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Allergen advisory statement is lacking on menus. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Establishment does not have a certified Rhode Island Food Protection Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2024

Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Raw animal foods (such as shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Knife was observed being stored in between handsink baseboard. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen and bar. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. walls and junctures by 3 bay sink and handwashing sink in kitchen 2. fan guards in walk-in cooler New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Insulated line in basement was observed leaking. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
